# Command

Reference for the `Command` family of typed workflow steps.

## Summary

- family: `command`
- kinds: `Command`

## Shared Step Fields

Shared step envelope fields such as `id`, `apiVersion`, `kind`, `when`, `retry`, `timeout`, `register`, and `metadata` are documented in [Workflow Schema](../workflow.md).

## `Command`

Run an explicit command as an escape hatch.

- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/command.schema.json`

### When To Use

Use this only when no typed step expresses the change clearly enough.

### Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-command
kind: Command
spec:
    command:
        - example
```

| Key | Type | Required | Default | Enum | Description | Example |
|---|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| `spec.command` | `array<string>` | yes | `` | `` |  | `[example]` |
| `spec.env` | `object` | no | `` | `` |  | `{...}` |
| `spec.sudo` | `boolean` | no | `false` | `` |  | `false` |
| `spec.timeout` | `string` | no | `` | `` |  | `example` |
